problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure may resolve Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
